g.aria-label: smosis is the process of a solvent moving from one compartment to another, across a semipermeable membrane, toward higher solute concentration. Osmotic pressure is generated at equilibrium due to the different heights of liquid on either side of the membrane and is equivalent to the pressure needed to equalize the fluid levels across the membrane.
O) Pure solvent Solution InitiallyAt equilibrium
Pressure applied to equalize fuid levels in both arms equals osmotic pressure, ∏ Net movement of H

path.aria-label: O is from pure water side to solution side At equilibrium, the fow of H
O is the same in both directions, so there is no net movement of H
